description: Capital gains distribution by size of gain, showing concentration among top taxpayers.

columns.band_lower: Lower bound of gain band in GBP
columns.share_of_gains_pct: Percentage of total gains in this band
columns.share_of_taxpayers_pct: Percentage of total taxpayers in this band
columns.cumul_gains_from_top_pct: Cumulative share of gains from top
columns.cumul_taxpayers_from_top_pct: Cumulative share of taxpayers from top
